name: Space-Age-Hardcore-Mode
title: ​Space Age: Hardcore Mode
author: thesixthroc
description:
Space Age: Hardcore Mode is a collection of mods & tweaks that tighten the gameplay of Space Age by removing shortcuts and adding interesting challenge.

Players need to build from scratch on Vulcanus, Fulgora and Gleba, and certain initial items are locked behind building a small on-planet science chain.

Virtually every tweak in this modpack is configurable in the settings. Optional dependencies contain additional Vanilla+ content.
